'''Debin Seylas''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed the [[Mektrun sector/Legends|Mektrun sector]] which included the [[Joralla system/Legends|Joralla system]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
